jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at Alkem Laboratories
jsonLd.description:
Alkem Laboratories has an exciting opening for a Radiologist at our Chennai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Alkem Laboratories:
Alkem Laboratories is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Alkem Laboratories!
